title: Jupyter Notebook Cell Locking Configuration
description: Configuration schema for cell-level locking mechanism during collaborative editing, including lock timeout settings, visual indicators, conflict resolution behavior, and user preferences for exclusive cell editing.

lockTimeout.title: Lock Timeout (milliseconds)
lockTimeout.description: Maximum duration a cell lock can be held before automatic expiration. Must be at least 60000ms (1 minute) for stability.

lockAcquisitionTimeout.title: Lock Acquisition Timeout (milliseconds)
lockAcquisitionTimeout.description: Maximum time to wait for acquiring a cell lock before giving up. Must be under 200ms per technical specifications.

heartbeatInterval.title: Heartbeat Interval (milliseconds)
heartbeatInterval.description: Interval between heartbeat signals to maintain active locks. Should be significantly less than lockTimeout.

maxRetries.title: Maximum Lock Acquisition Retries
maxRetries.description: Number of times to retry acquiring a lock before failing.

retryDelay.title: Retry Delay (milliseconds)
retryDelay.description: Delay between lock acquisition retry attempts.

autoRelease.title: Auto-release Lock on Inactivity
autoRelease.description: Whether to automatically release locks when user becomes inactive or leaves the cell.

enableVisualIndicators.title: Enable Visual Lock Indicators
enableVisualIndicators.description: Whether to display visual indicators showing cell lock status and ownership.

visualSettings.title: Visual Lock Indicator Settings
visualSettings.description: Configuration for visual appearance of lock indicators.

lockIndicatorColor.title: Lock Indicator Color
lockIndicatorColor.description: Color for lock indicators (CSS color format).

lockIndicatorOpacity.title: Lock Indicator Opacity
lockIndicatorOpacity.description: Opacity level for lock indicators (0.0 to 1.0).

lockBorderWidth.title: Lock Border Width (pixels)
lockBorderWidth.description: Width of border around locked cells.

lockBorderStyle.title: Lock Border Style
lockBorderStyle.description: CSS border style for locked cells.

showOwnerAvatar.title: Show Lock Owner Avatar
showOwnerAvatar.description: Whether to display avatar/icon of lock owner.

showLockTimer.title: Show Lock Timer
showLockTimer.description: Whether to display countdown timer for lock expiration.

animateTransitions.title: Animate Lock Transitions
animateTransitions.description: Whether to animate lock acquisition and release transitions.

conflictResolution.title: Conflict Resolution Settings
conflictResolution.description: Configuration for handling lock conflicts and simultaneous access attempts.

showConflictNotifications.title: Show Conflict Notifications
showConflictNotifications.description: Whether to display notifications when lock conflicts occur.

notificationDuration.title: Notification Duration (milliseconds)
notificationDuration.description: How long to display conflict notifications.

allowForceUnlock.title: Allow Force Unlock
allowForceUnlock.description: Whether to allow users to forcefully unlock cells (with appropriate permissions).

conflictStrategy.title: Conflict Resolution Strategy
conflictStrategy.description: Strategy for handling lock conflicts when multiple users try to access the same cell.

userPreferences.title: User Preference Settings
userPreferences.description: User-specific preferences for cell locking behavior.

autoLockOnEdit.title: Auto-lock on Edit
autoLockOnEdit.description: Whether to automatically acquire lock when user starts editing a cell.

releaseOnCellChange.title: Release Lock on Cell Change
releaseOnCellChange.description: Whether to release lock when user moves to a different cell.

showLockStatusInToolbar.title: Show Lock Status in Toolbar
showLockStatusInToolbar.description: Whether to display lock status information in notebook toolbar.

enableKeyboardShortcuts.title: Enable Keyboard Shortcuts
enableKeyboardShortcuts.description: Whether to enable keyboard shortcuts for lock operations.

lockOnFocus.title: Lock on Cell Focus
lockOnFocus.description: Whether to acquire lock when cell receives focus (not just on edit).

permissions.title: Permission Settings
permissions.description: Configuration for lock-related permissions and access controls.

requirePermissionForLock.title: Require Permission for Lock
requirePermissionForLock.description: Whether users need specific permission to acquire locks.

adminCanForceUnlock.title: Admin Can Force Unlock
adminCanForceUnlock.description: Whether users with admin privileges can force unlock any cell.

ownerCanExtendLock.title: Owner Can Extend Lock
ownerCanExtendLock.description: Whether lock owners can extend lock duration beyond default timeout.

maxLocksPerUser.title: Maximum Locks per User
maxLocksPerUser.description: Maximum number of simultaneous locks one user can hold. 0 means unlimited.

debugging.title: Debugging and Logging Settings
debugging.description: Configuration for debugging and logging lock operations.

enableDebugLogging.title: Enable Debug Logging
enableDebugLogging.description: Whether to enable detailed logging of lock operations for debugging.

logLockEvents.title: Log Lock Events
logLockEvents.description: Whether to log lock acquisition, release, and conflict events.

trackLockMetrics.title: Track Lock Metrics
trackLockMetrics.description: Whether to collect metrics on lock performance and usage.
